/usr/bin/clang-18 -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fsanitize=address "CMakeFiles/tg-tui.dir/src/main/tg_tui.c.o" -o tg-tui  libtg-domain-read.a libtg-domain-write.a libtg-tui-lib.a libtg-domain-read.a libtg-app.a libtg-proto.a libtg-crypto.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
